title: Del Caos a los Titanes

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. A glowing, ethereal spark of light drifts through a vast, infinite dark void.
panels.en: But even in that light, the void remains. Before anything else, there is only Chaos.

facil.es: La luz brilla. Pero al principio, solo hay Caos.

intermedio.es: La luz viaja por la oscuridad. Antes de todo, hay Caos infinito.

nativo.es: Aun con esa luz, el vacío persiste. Antes de que nada existiera, solo había Caos.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gaia, a woman with skin like cracked earth and hair made of moss and roots, emerges from the swirling abyss.
panels.en: From the depth, Gaia emerges. Beneath her feet, there is only silence.

facil.es: Nace Gea. Bajo ella, hay silencio.

intermedio.es: Gea surge de la nada. En su mundo, hay tierra y silencio.

nativo.es: Del abismo surge Gea. Bajo sus pies, solo hay una calma eterna.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Uranus, a man with skin like the night sky filled with constellations, descends toward Gaia.
panels.en: Above, Uranus appears. In the sky, there are stars.

facil.es: Arriba, Urano aparece. En el cielo, hay estrellas.

intermedio.es: Urano desciende. En el firmamento, hay luces brillantes.

nativo.es: Urano desciende sobre ella. En la bóveda celeste, hay constelaciones.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gaia and Uranus embrace, and golden light explodes between them.
panels.en: They join. Between them, there is raw power.

facil.es: Ellos se unen. Entre ellos, hay gran fuerza.

intermedio.es: Se abrazan. En su unión, hay mucha energía.

nativo.es: Se funden en un abrazo. Entre sus cuerpos, hay un poder elemental.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Massive, towering humanoid figures—the first Titans—rise from the ground around Gaia and Uranus.
panels.en: The Titans are born. In the world, there are new gods.

facil.es: Los Titanes nacen. En el mundo, hay nuevos dioses.

intermedio.es: Nacen los Titanes. En la tierra, hay seres poderosos.

nativo.es: Surgen los primeros Titanes. En este mundo joven, hay deidades gigantescas.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gea, a giant woman with skin of dark soil and hair of green vines, stands on the primordial earth. Above her, the starry cloak of Uranus, a man with skin of shifting nebulae and constellations, looms.
panels.en: There is light in the sky. There is power in the ground.

facil.es: Hay luz en el cielo. Hay poder en la tierra.

intermedio.es: Hay una luz brillante en el cielo. Hay mucho poder antiguo en la tierra.

nativo.es: Hay una luz incandescente en el firmamento. Hay un poder primigenio en las entrañas de la tierra.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gea, a giant woman with skin of dark soil and hair of green vines, looks upward as massive, golden, glowing figures emerge from the horizon.
panels.en: There are new children. There are giants in the world.

facil.es: Hay hijos nuevos. Hay gigantes en el mundo.

intermedio.es: Hay niños nuevos y fuertes. Hay gigantes poderosos en todo el mundo.

nativo.es: Hay descendientes colosales. Hay titanes inmensos caminando por el mundo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Oceanus and Tethys, two towering titans with shimmering, liquid-like skin, rise from a churning, golden sea.
panels.en: There is water in the ocean. There are waves in the sea.

facil.es: Hay agua en el océano. Hay olas en el mar.

intermedio.es: Hay mucha agua en el océano profundo. Hay olas gigantes en el mar.

nativo.es: Hay una vasta agua en el océano. Hay olas turbulentas en el mar infinito.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Hyperion, a titan with eyes like burning suns, walks across a landscape of molten gold.
panels.en: There is fire in the land. There is a sun in the sky.

facil.es: Hay fuego en la tierra. Hay un sol en el cielo.

intermedio.es: Hay mucho fuego en la tierra. Hay un sol brillante en el cielo.

nativo.es: Hay un fuego eterno en la tierra. Hay un sol radiante en el firmamento.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. The Titans gather in a circle, looking up at Uranus, who watches them with an expression of cold, distant authority.
panels.en: There are many brothers. There is order in the chaos.

facil.es: Hay muchos hermanos. Hay orden en el caos.

intermedio.es: Hay muchos hermanos poderosos. Hay un poco de orden en el caos.

nativo.es: Hay una multitud de hermanos. Hay un nuevo orden emergiendo del caos.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gea, a woman with skin like cracked earth and eyes of moss, rises from the primordial ground, her hair blending into roots.
panels.en: There is a new shape in the earth; Gea, the Mother, rises from the dust.

facil.es: Hay una forma nueva en la tierra. Gea, la madre, nace del polvo.

intermedio.es: Hay una figura nueva en la tierra virgen; Gea, la Madre, surge del polvo antiguo.

nativo.es: Hay una presencia latente en la tierra primigenia; Gea, la Madre, emerge de las entrañas del polvo.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Urano, a giant man made of starlit obsidian and swirling nebulas, descends from the heights to cover Gea.
panels.en: There is a vast sky above; Urano, the Father, descends to meet the earth.

facil.es: Hay un cielo grande arriba. Urano, el padre, baja a la tierra.

intermedio.es: Hay un firmamento vasto arriba; Urano, el Padre, desciende para abrazar a la tierra.

nativo.es: Hay una bóveda infinita sobre el mundo; Urano, el Padre, desciende para cubrir la faz de la tierra.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gea (skin of cracked earth) and Urano (starlit obsidian) touch hands, sparking golden light.
panels.en: There is a powerful union between the sky and the ground.

facil.es: Hay una unión fuerte entre el cielo y la tierra.

intermedio.es: Hay una alianza poderosa entre el cielo estrellado y la tierra fértil.

nativo.es: Hay un vínculo sagrado y primordial entre el firmamento y la materia terrestre.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Six giant silhouettes, the first Titans, emerge from the mist behind Gea and Urano.
panels.en: There are six titans, the first children, born from this union.

facil.es: Hay seis titanes, los primeros hijos, nacidos de esta unión.

intermedio.es: Hay seis titanes, los hijos primogénitos, que nacen de esta unión divina.

nativo.es: Hay seis colosos, la estirpe primigenia, que brotan de aquel encuentro cósmico.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. The Titans stand tall, radiating raw energy; the world around them begins to take structured form.
panels.en: There is a new order in the world; the Titans take their place.

facil.es: Hay un orden nuevo en el mundo. Los titanes ocupan su lugar.

intermedio.es: Hay un orden naciente en el mundo; los titanes toman su lugar con poder.

nativo.es: Hay una arquitectura de poder en el cosmos; los titanes reclaman su dominio absoluto.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Urano, a towering figure of swirling nebulae and starlight, stands above the lush, verdant body of Gea, who reclines as the living earth.
panels.en: There is a deep bond between the sky and the ground.

facil.es: Hay una unión fuerte entre el cielo y la tierra.

intermedio.es: Hay un vínculo profundo entre el cielo estrellado y la tierra fértil.

nativo.es: Hay una alianza primigenia entre el firmamento sideral y la tierra fecunda.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Cronos, the youngest Titan with eyes like cold flint, stares up at his father Urano with growing resentment.
panels.en: There is a dark shadow growing in the heart of the youngest son.

facil.es: Hay una sombra oscura en el hijo menor.

intermedio.es: Hay un rencor que crece en el corazón del hijo más joven.

nativo.es: Hay una semilla de insurrección gestándose en el espíritu del vástago menor.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Gea whispers to Cronos, her face etched with ancient sorrow and secret plans.
panels.en: There are secrets between the mother and her son.

facil.es: Hay secretos entre la madre y el hijo.

intermedio.es: Hay planes ocultos que la tierra susurra a su hijo.

nativo.es: Hay conspiraciones silenciosas tejidas entre la madre y su prole.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Cronos holds a jagged, glowing sickle of adamantine, forged in the depths of the earth.
panels.en: There is a weapon of power ready for the coup.

facil.es: Hay un arma poderosa en sus manos.

intermedio.es: Hay un filo de metal divino preparado para el golpe.

nativo.es: Hay un acero de adamantina forjado para el parricidio.

panels.art_prompt: Epic mythological graphic-novel style: painterly, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, classical composition, gold-and-ember palette, semi-realistic proportions, cinematic. Consistent character designs. 3:4 vertical panel. NO text, NO letters, NO speech bubbles in the image. Urano looks down, unaware, as Cronos steps out from the shadows of the earth.
panels.en: There is no peace left in the cosmos.

facil.es: Ya no hay paz en el mundo.

intermedio.es: Ya no hay tranquilidad en el cosmos naciente.

nativo.es: Ya no hay sosiego en la vasta extensión del universo.

cliffhanger: The sickle rises. The sky is about to bleed, and the golden age of the Titans is about to end in a single, brutal stroke.
closingBeat: In the beginning, there was only existence; now, there is the hunger for dominion.
